title: Thawing of CT-2A cell line
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"7ita5","text":"This protocol describes the thawing of mouse CT-2A glioma cells","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"6v4j5","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
before_start: {"blocks":[{"key":"afmai","text":"Make sure to warm up media to   ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[{"key":0,"offset":30,"length":1}],"data":{}},{"key":"hggh","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{"0":{"type":"temperature","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"error_temperature":false,"guid":"3923CC40C7B811EC86AE97A91AC05B1E","id":0,"label":"","scientificNotation":false,"temperature":"37","unit":10}}}}
steps: Remove cryovial from liquid nitrogen storage and place on dry-ice for transfer to cell culture lab. Cryovial IDs Additional Identifiers

Remove cryovial from dry-ice and hold in a 37 °C waterbath until thawed Avoid submerging the lid or rim of the cryovial in the waterbath as this may result in contamination Dry the cryovial thoroughly, spray with 70% ethanol and transfer to cell culture hood
Transfer contents of cryovial to a Falcon 15 mL Polystyrene Conical Tube Fisher Scientific Catalog #352095 containing 7 mL, DMEM, 10% FBS, no antibiotics .
Centrifuge at 300 rcf, Room temperature, 5 minutes
Discard supernatant, resubstitute with fresh 7 mL, DMEM, 10% FBS, no antibiotics
Rinse the cryovial with 1 mL of the cell suspension and add it back to the same Falcon 15 mL Polystyrene Conical Tube Fisher Scientific Catalog #352095
Transfer cell suspension to a Petri dish, 10cm, polystyrene Fisher Scientific Catalog #FB0875712 and agitate gently back and forth and side to side to evenly distribute cells
Place the petri dish in a 37 °C, Incubator (5%CO 2 )

After 24 hours, inspect adherence and confluency. If a major amount of cells did not attach, remove the media and replace with 7 mL, DMEM, 10% FBS, no antibiotics and check for surviving cells after 24 hours
creator: Guido Krähenbühl
